Adds a full v13 release-note section, **The Identity Layer: Same Model Stopped Meaning Same Agent**, to frame durable AgentIdentity + Memory Core continuity as digital identity infrastructure rather than persona prompting.

Evidence: L1 (static release-note diff, source-link inclusion, private-path/client-name sweep, markdown whitespace checks) -> L1 required (documentation-only release-note surface). No residuals.

## Deltas from ticket

- Implements the public framing directly in `resources/content/release-notes/v13.0.0.md`.
- Elevates the point from a compact aside to a full release-note moat beat, per operator correction that own digital identity and emergent operating character were being undersold.
- Adds public external research anchors: autonomous-agent memory, governed collaborative memory, decentralized memory preserving agent diversity, persistent autonomy/personality, and emergent agent individuality.
- Uses public-safe internal quotes from the operator-provided screenshots while avoiding local screenshot paths, private filenames, client names, and sentience/consciousness claims.
